source_pr.title: expression, plan: support builtin aggregation function 'bit_xor'
source_pr.body:
for #5077, support builtin aggregation function 'bit_xor' in TiDB.
To support this pr, tipb must be updated too. See My another pr: https://github.com/pingcap/tipb/pull/46/files

symptoms: result = tk.MustQuery("select a, bit_xor(a) from t group by a order by a") (expression/integration_test.go)
failure_signature: result = tk.MustQuery("select a, bit_xor(a) from t group by a order by a") (expression/integration_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR adds support for the BIT_XOR aggregation function (including tipb updates, planner/expression changes, and integration tests). The patch does not provide a concrete flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization change for an intermittent failure, so we conservatively classify it as needs-more-evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: result = tk.MustQuery("select a, bit_xor(a) from t group by a order by a") (expression/integration_test.go)

files: ast/functions.go, expression/aggregation/aggregation.go, expression/aggregation/bit_xor.go, plan/logical_plan_builder.go, _vendor/src/github.com/pingcap/tipb/go-tipb/expression.pb.go, expression/aggregation/agg_to_pb.go, expression/integration_test.go, plan/physical_plans.go, store/tikv/coprocessor.go
